purpose: Carry the five user-supplied research survivors into an FTMO joint-equity marginal screen without assigning fictitious EA IDs or deployment permission.
weight_operation: Carve the candidate weight from all locked incumbent sleeves proportionally so total weight remains one.

path_contract.input: native exact MT5 report round trips
path_contract.equity_grid: synchronized M15 where available; AUDJPY H1 is a disclosed coarse conservative path source
path_contract.adverse_fill: full observed bar high/low without a Q08 cap; entry and exit bars therefore remain conservative
path_contract.native_spread: already included in MT5 report prices

selection_contract.development_rule: The same representation and candidate weight must strictly improve both normal and adverse pass rate versus the locked incumbent.
selection_contract.validation_rule: The frozen development survivor must not reduce either normal or adverse 2023 pass rate.
selection_contract.candidate_count_after_development: at most one, ranked by minimum development improvement, then summed improvement, then lower weight, then representation name
selection_contract.reason_sealed_holdout_closed: The five source families were already selected with global 2024-2025 visibility.

label: RESEARCH_ONLY_NO_GO
